title: Plumbing and climate control
seoTitle: Plumbing and climate control | Instal Berrozpe
seoDescription: Audited service with plumbing, air conditioning, heating, boilers and solar thermal energy on the current Instal Berrozpe website.
intro: The current website presents this service as water and climate solutions for home or business.
summary: It groups plumbing, air conditioning, heating, boilers and solar thermal energy according to the content audit.

benefits.title: Key points
items: Service focused on thermal comfort and water management.
The current website presents it for home or business.
Five sub-blocks grouped in one audited page.

process.title: Described process
items: Contact to explain the water or climate need.
Advice on the most suitable system.

items.question: Which solutions are included in this service page?
items.answer: The audit detects plumbing, air conditioning, heating, boilers and solar thermal energy.

items.question: Does the current website position it for home or business?
items.answer: Yes. The current wording refers to home or business in several sections.

items.question: Is wifi control mentioned in this service?
items.answer: Yes. The current website mentions it for some equipment, but it should be validated before being used as a main commercial promise.

pendingConfirmation: The mention of wifi-controlled equipment appears on the current website and needs editorial validation.
Coverage outside the local area is mentioned in general terms and requires geographic definition.
